text: @ [ ] &2 Transmission Control Protocol (TCP) @ usummanie @ s TCP is a connection based protocol. A connection is established between two devices using a rancdom port on a client and a known port on the server. Once established the connection is bi-directional. The “connection” is a reliable connection, provided via the segments encapsulated in IP Packets |—| - o :‘ “ Ip\\ﬂ Client Doesn’t Acknowledge Segment Retransmitted EPHEMERAL PORT WELL KNOWN PORT g Retransmission 5 Segments linked to a v connection, error <> <> <> > < <> <> <> checking, ordering, h n E h Y n a a n and retransmission : : - - : - - - - L3 Packets - No error checking, no ordering, no association
